SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.omf

Class OmfRecord

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.omf.OmfRecord
All Implemented Interfaces:
StreamWritable
Direct Known Subclasses:
OmfRecordComent, OmfRecordExtdef, OmfRecordFixupp, OmfRecordGrpdef, OmfRecordLedata, OmfRecordLidata, OmfRecordLinnum, OmfRecordLnames, OmfRecordModend, OmfRecordPubdef, OmfRecordSegdef, OmfRecordTheadr
public abstract class OmfRecord extends Object implements StreamWritable
Abstract base class for all OMF record types.

Each OMF record represents a specific data structure in the object file format, such as segment definitions, symbol definitions, or relocation information.

  • Constructor Details

    • OmfRecord

      protected OmfRecord(OmfFile file, OmfRecordType type)
      Creates a new OMF record.
      Parameters:
      file - the parent OMF file
      type - the record type

  • Method Details

    • getParsingTypeValue

      protected static byte getParsingTypeValue()
      Returns the specific record type value being parsed in the current thread. This allows subclasses to determine whether they are parsing a 16-bit or 32-bit variant.
      Returns:
      the record type byte value, or 0 if not currently parsing

    • getFile

      public OmfFile getFile()
      Returns the parent OMF file.
      Returns:
      the parent OMF file

    • getType

      public OmfRecordType getType()
      Returns the record type.
      Returns:
      the record type

    • getSpecificTypeValue

      public byte getSpecificTypeValue()
      Get the specific record type value. For records with multiple variants (e.g., 16-bit vs 32-bit), this returns the specific variant value. By default, returns the standard type value.
      Returns:
      the specific record type byte value

    • getLength

      public long getLength()
      Returns the length in bytes of this record's full serialized form (record type + record length + record data + checksum).
      Specified by:
      getLength in interface StreamWritable
      Returns:
      full serialized record length in bytes

    • getDataLength

      protected long getDataLength()
      Returns the length in bytes of this record's payload data (excluding type, length, and checksum).
      Returns:
      payload length in bytes

    • validateDataLength

      protected final void validateDataLength(String recordName)
      Validates that this record's payload length fits in the OMF record length field.
      Parameters:
      recordName - record name used in diagnostics

    • write

      public void write(OutputStream outputStream) throws IOException
      Writes this record's full encoded form to the output stream. This includes the type byte, record length, payload, and checksum.
      Specified by:
      write in interface StreamWritable
      Parameters:
      outputStream - the output stream
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • write

      protected abstract void write(ByteOutputStream bos) throws IOException
      Writes this record's data to the output stream.
      Parameters:
      bos - the output stream
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs

    • parse

      public static OmfRecord parse(OmfFile file, ByteInputStream bis) throws IOException
      Parse an OMF record from the input stream.
      Parameters:
      file - the parent OmfFile
      bis - the input stream to read from
      Returns:
      the parsed OmfRecord
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs
